search with cubiomes (xpple's fork)
bt at 0 0
jp at 0 0
bt and jp must be at most 1 chunck away from each other
spawn must must be at most 2 chunck away from 0 0
bt must contain 1 tnt and 12 irons, or 1 tnt and 10 irons with 2 golds
scanned from lower48=0 to lower48=4612748

post processed with cubiomes viewer
bt between (0,0) and (16,16)
spawnpoint bt+(-10,-10),(10,10)
jp bt+(-10,-10),(10,10)

* = candidate
** = good candidate
s = spawnpoint issue
b = bt issue
p = pyramid issue
w = wood issue
w* = wood issue but good candidate

only keep ** seeds

1,2,3,4,5 = number of sands to mine for bt
o = good jp orientation
t = good tnt spot
x = terrain issue

4597612269591863324 4ot
6696571170923364518 3ot
-8344607159563960154 3ot
3688448094816686902 4ot
-4180466354106412227 3t
-8369095482537511195 1
704250391730594107 2ot
8559091091818184305 2ot
-7937031393286521231 2otx
-8125619627682660751 3ot
1746552230490260039 3t
7722547461034366845 1ot
